vwapNotes: SPY: 745.76 fiyat VWAP (745.86) hemen altinda, stabil. QQQ: 725.17 fiyat VWAP (727.23) altinda, tech weakness. IWM: 299.32 fiyat VWAP (300.32) altinda, small cap lag. Genel gorunum: QQQ ve IWM VWAP altinda = risk-off bias. SPY VWAP'a yakin = S&P 500 dayanikli. Tech zayif, defansif ve small cap baski altinda. Gap fill riski dusuk.
